question: A HIPAA authorization has which of the following characteristics:
canonical_answer: Uses "plain language" that the data subject can understand, similar to the requirement for an informed consent document.

appears_in.title: Citi Hipaa Training
appears_in.answer: Uses "plain language" that the data subject can understand, similar to the requirement for an informed consent document.

appears_in.title: Hipaa Authorization Has Which Of The Following Characteristics
appears_in.answer: Identifiable health information that is created or held by covered entities and their business associates.

appears_in.title: The Hipaa Minimum Necessary Standard Applies
appears_in.answer: Uses "plain language" that the data subject can understand, similar to the requirement for an informed consent document.

appears_in.title: Ucla Hipaa Training
appears_in.answer: Uses "plain language" that the data subject can understand, similar to the requirement for an informed consent document.

appears_in.title: Under Hipaa Disclosure Accounting Is Required
appears_in.answer: Uses "plain language" that the data subject can understand, similar to the requirement for an informed consent document.
